---
title: 'The Need'
date: '2011-09-17T13:02:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2226558844386881150'
blogger_filename: '/2011/09/need.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - '2nd Car'
---

It's interesting... I am having to make decisions that affect a family, what schedule is best for work that works for them too. A second car is needed for this family because the kids need to be able to get out more and participate in activities out of the house. I'd like to get Connor into&nbsp;cub scouts&nbsp;and both of them into gymnastics or sports...
